<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Set the transform of an entity"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"put"}
  path={"/entities/{entity_id}/transform"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Update the position, rotation, and scale of the specified entity.

  as={"h2"}
